calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Decree
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on Ana Malia Finau's Motion to Set Aside the Decree Changing the Name of the Minor, Jiovarni Kaisani Matakiogo Benji Rinau, entered November 8, 2018.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Petitioner Ibrahima Soriba Bangoura was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Moving party Anamalia Finau was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

After review of the motion and opposition papers, hearing argument from the parties, and good cause appearing therefor, the Court GRANTS Anamalia Finau's Motion to Set Aside the Decree issued November 8, 2018, changing the minor's name from Jiovarni Kaisani Matakiogo Benji Rinau to Issa Banjoura.

Proposed Order Granting Motion to Set Aside the Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
